statement: In every magma, Equation 1716 (`x = (y * x) * ((z * w) * w)`) implies Equation 4500 (`x * (y * y) = (z * z) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0314
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op z w) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y y)) = (op (op z z) w)
